title: Lakebase (Autoscaling) now in Public Preview
body: Lakebase (Autoscaling) is now in Public Preview on AWS. This new version of Lakebase introduces autoscaling compute, scale-to-zero, database branching, instant restore, and a redesigned project-based interface. To allow users to explore the new version, usage of Lakebase Autoscaling is free for a limited time. Billing for Lakebase Autoscaling usage begins in January 2026. See [Get started with Lakebase Postgres (Autoscaling Preview)](/aws/en/oltp/projects/get-started).

ref_links.text: Get started with Lakebase Postgres (Autoscaling Preview)
